criteria.text: Landing page loads and renders a list of podcasts fetched from the Best Podcasts API (GET /best_podcasts, sort=recent_published_first)
Each podcast tile shows at least: cover image, title, author/feed name
A search input is present on the landing page
When the search input is empty, podcasts from GET /best_podcasts are shown
When the search input has a value, a request is sent to the Search API (GET /search?q=<query>&type=podcast) and the response is rendered
Search requests are debounced or throttled (verified in DevTools while typing)
A loading indicator is shown while a request is in flight
Clicking a podcast tile navigates to a details page for that podcast
Details page lists episodes from the Podcast Details API (GET /podcasts/{id})
Each episode item shows at least: title, publication date, duration
An in-app control returns the user to the landing page without using the browser's Back button
Selecting an episode starts playback in the player
Player has a working Play / Pause toggle button
Player shows current time and total time (or remaining time)
Player has a progress bar that updates as the audio plays
Clicking the progress bar seeks the audio to the clicked position
Player stays visible on screen during navigation between pages
User can use search and browse episode lists while audio continues playing without interruption
Selecting a different episode replaces the current stream with the new one (no double-playback)
A playlist page exists and is reachable from the app's navigation
User can add an episode to the playlist from the details page or the player
User can remove an episode from the playlist
Playlist contents persist across page reloads (stored in localStorage)
Playback position of the currently playing episode is stored in localStorage
When the user returns to a previously listened episode, playback resumes from roughly 10 seconds before the last saved position
A UI framework (React, Vue, Angular, Svelte, etc.) is used
Page transitions cause full reloads (not an SPA)
Console errors during normal use
Layout is visibly broken on the latest Chrome at a 1280px viewport
